title: Entity Investigate Suspicious Location Behavior
description: Allows this entity to move towards a "suspicious" position based on data gathered in `minecraft:suspect_tracking`.

goal_radius.title: Goal Radius
goal_radius.description: Distance in blocks within the entity considers it has reached it's target position.

priority.title: Priority
priority.description:
As priority approaches 0, the priority is increased. The higher the priority, the sooner this behavior will be executed as a goal.

Sample values:
• warden: 5

speed_multiplier.title: Speed Multiplier
speed_multiplier.description:
Movement speed multiplier

Sample values:
• warden: 0.7
